steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The notes say the BFTU is a national union federation in Botswana. They also say ITUC-Africa is a regional union federation that represents national union federations across Africa and specifically represents the BFTU.

steps.title: Connect both organizations
steps.content: Choice A describes only ITUC-Africa, Choice C describes national federations' work, and Choice D describes only the BFTU. The choice that explains the relationship must say that ITUC-Africa represents the BFTU as one of the national federations. The answer is B.
